comment: Two INDEPENDENT schema SemVers + one free-id ground dataset. The served fq: view is named to make its lineage visible: it is futuram-query <fqSchema.version> applied to (composition-statement <compositionSchema.version> + dataset <dataset.id>). Each schema bumps on its own: PATCH = clarifying/non-semantic; MINOR = additive (backward-compatible); MAJOR = breaking change existing queries depend on.

compositionSchema.comment: The composition-statement model + the FutuRaM class hierarchy: the ground vocabulary the composition statements are written in.

querySchema.comment: The futuram-query (fq:) projection: the query TBox AND the resolver/plugin layer (src/builder/resolver/) that DERIVES the served view. Versioned independently because a plugin or the fq: TBox can change the served output without the composition schema changing.

dataset.comment: The active ground-truth composition set. id is a FREE label (NOT a schema SemVer). selection defines its content as a subset of the real ELV data via the existing build_instances knobs (files = drivetrains; years/window). pinnedCompositionSchema records which composition-statement schema version the statements are written against. A scaling-test run just changes the selection and the id.
